title: Roblox Noobs
description: The "Roblox Noobs" Resource Pack replaces the skeleton with the much more chaotic Roblox Noob!
body:
Have you ever wanted to smack the Roblox Noob? The "Roblox Noobs" Resource Pack replaces the skeleton with the much more chaotic Roblox Noob! Looking totally out of place, this Roblox Noob is a wonderful addition to your Cursed Minecraft playthrough!

[Requires Optifine or Optifine Alternative!]
